description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a prominent green gable roof and large glass windows, especially at the front and side extensions. The front facade showcases a wide, glass-enclosed porch or sunroom with steps leading up to the main entrance, and a striking triangular window arrangement above. The structure is set on a rectangular plot with a stone foundation and light-colored exterior walls, providing a clean and contemporary appearance. The side views reveal a mix of large and small windows, with one side dominated by a long, uninterrupted wall and the other by a glass extension. The rear of the house includes additional glass panels and a secondary entrance, maintaining the modern aesthetic. The overall layout suggests a spacious, single-family residence with ample natural light and a focus on indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern house with a green gable roof, large glass windows, and a glass-enclosed porch, set on a stone foundation with light-colored walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide glass-enclosed porch, steps, and prominent triangular windows above.
description_view_1: Side view with a long, plain wall, two small windows, and the glass extension visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a secondary entrance, a mix of large and small windows, and the continuation of the green gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the glass extension, large windows, and the house's overall rectangular footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass extensions
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a glass-enclosed porch, and a prominent overhanging roof with triangular windows above
